name: East-West Road
note: Approximate. Ambushed by a wendigo pack while traveling toward Summarch; found blood glyphs carved in their hides.

name: Summarch
note: Investigated Grandmaster Hagar's death, first Hooded Man encounter, killed Panry Chenech, tasked to pursue the Grandmother north.

name: Watchwater
note: Approximate, interpolated between Summarch and the Far North. Crossed the Watchwater to enter the Far North.

name: Far North
note: Clamped into frame from native y ~-92. Defeated a Leshy conjured by the Grandmother before pressing on to the Fell Mountains.

name: Fell Mountains
note: Clamped into frame from native y ~-93. Found the dragon Lugal's lair, brokered his neutrality, and routed the Grandmother's camp.

name: Summarch
note: Approximate, offset from prior visit for clarity. Returned to find the city in open rebellion.

name: Siege of the Seat
note: Approximate, at Summarch's citadel. Cresadoc, the Hooded Man, and Selwin killed; Kembar returned; party expelled from the Allhammers.

name: Sepos
note: Approximate, interpolated south from Summarch toward the White Sea. Fled here with Aderyn Sly's aid and hired Captain Lahar.

name: White Sea
note: Set sail on the Tamarnīn along a dangerous route across the White Sea bound for Epēshu.

name: Paerāndas
note: Diverted into the archipelago to shelter from an oncoming storm; later explored ancient ruins on one of its islands.

name: White Sea (Dagon's attack)
note: Approximate, interpolated between the Paerāndas and Epēshu. Attacked at sea by Dagon, who was defeated and vanished.

name: Epēshu
note: Arrived at the great port city; Aderyn revealed himself as a Wite before glyphs and enchantments began failing citywide.
